nodes.title: Hunger Character Setup
nodes.description: Given a HungerCharacter GameObject, when Start() runs, then stats are set (identity: Hunger/Gluttony, SoundTheme: Creaking), HungerMoveset is applied, and AvailableActions is populated.

nodes.title: Hunger Moveset
nodes.description: Given a HungerCharacter after Start(), then AvailableActions contains 'Hunger's Grip' and other thematic actions with appropriate damage, stamina costs, and element types.

nodes.title: False Character Setup
nodes.description: Given a FalseCharacter GameObject, when Start() runs, then stats are set for the Deceit enemy with identity and appropriate moveset.

nodes.title: Lady Mede Character Setup
nodes.description: Given a LadyMedeCharacter GameObject, when Start() runs, then stats are set for the Greed enemy with identity (SoundTheme: Greed) and appropriate moveset.

nodes.title: Wrath Character Setup
nodes.description: Given a WrathCharacter GameObject, when Start() runs, then stats are set for the Wrath enemy with identity (SoundTheme: Wrath) and appropriate moveset.

nodes.title: Pride Character Setup
nodes.description: Given a PrideCharacter GameObject, when Start() runs, then stats are set for the Pride enemy with identity (SoundTheme: Pride) and appropriate moveset.

nodes.title: Green Knight Character Setup
nodes.description: Given a GreenKnightCharacter GameObject, when Start() runs, then boss-level stats are set with identity and GreenKnightMoveset is applied.

nodes.title: Elde Character Setup
nodes.description: Given an EldeCharacter GameObject, when Start() runs, then stats are set for the Old Age boss with EldeMoveset applied.

nodes.title: Elde Aging On Hit
nodes.description: Given an EldeCharacter attacks a player, when ApplyCustomDamage detects attacker is EldeCharacter, then SaveManager.IncrementEldeHitsAccrued() is called and AgingManager.ApplyAgeToCharacter() applies the new aging tier.

nodes.title: Simple Enemy AI Decision
nodes.description: Given a SimpleEnemyAI component on an enemy, when it is the enemy's turn, then the AI selects an action from AvailableActions and a target from the player list.

nodes.title: Adaptive AI Targets Broken
nodes.description: Given an AdaptiveEnemyAI component, when selecting a target, then broken (IsBroken) and low-HP characters are prioritized via weighted scoring.

nodes.title: Adaptive AI Counters Dodge
nodes.description: Given player frequently dodges or parries (observed via OnActionExecuted), when AdaptiveEnemyAI selects an action, then it adapts strategy (e.g. multi-hit, area attacks) to counter frequent dodging.

nodes.title: Boss AI Dialogue Phases
nodes.description: Given a BaseBossAI subclass, when boss HP crosses entry/midpoint/desperation thresholds, then the corresponding dialogue is triggered via BossDialogueManager.

nodes.title: Boss AI Narrative Pause
nodes.description: Given a boss uses a special action, when BaseBossAI processes the action, then a narrative pause is triggered (combat paused briefly for dialogue display).

nodes.title: Green Knight Boss Logic
nodes.description: Given a GreenKnightBossAI, when processing turns, then phase transitions and actions follow GreenKnight-specific patterns (beheading game, regeneration, chapel mechanics).

nodes.title: Hunger Boss Logic
nodes.description: Given a HungerBossAI, when processing turns, then Hunger-specific behavior is applied (e.g. applying hunger stacks to players, ethereal attacks).

nodes.title: Pride Boss Logic
nodes.description: Given a PrideBossAI, when processing turns, then Pride-specific behavior and phase transitions are applied.
